title: Watch: US strikes Iran's Qom turbine engine production plant; before-after images reveal scale of damage
content:
The US has conducted a strike on Iran's turbine engine production plant located in Qom.
*   The strike reportedly inflicted significant damage on the facility.
*   Before-and-after images have been released, revealing the extensive scale of the damage.

title: Owens Photo Fuels Rumours: Viral shot spurs George Farmer black eye talk; injury claims unproven
content:
A viral photo associated with "Owens" has surfaced, sparking widespread rumors.
*   The primary subject of the speculation is George Farmer, with talk suggesting he has a black eye.
*   Claims regarding any injury to George Farmer remain unproven and are currently just rumors.
